response.justification: Candidate has ~16 years of solid hands-on software engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and data-integration domains, but the resume shows no demonstrated AI/ML expertise, no AI products or platforms shipped, no advanced degree in an AI-related field, and the title/scope is Senior/Staff IC rather than Director-level Principal. The role demands recognized AI authority and strategic advisory experience with cloud and AI platforms, which is absent here. Recent mention of MCP/agentic tooling at Google is promising but too thin to meet a Principal AI Strategy bar.
strengths: ~16 years of broad full-stack and infrastructure engineering experience
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, MCP, and developer tooling at Google
Strong craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, open-source platform ownership (GISCollective)
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or recognized AI expertise
Lacks Director-level / Principal IC scope and strategic advisory track record
No advanced degree in AI; cloud-strategy and customer-advisory experience not evidenced

key_factors.factor: Missing recognized AI expertise and shipped AI products
Seniority gap vs. Director-level Principal IC scope
Breadth of engineering experience and recent AI-agent tooling exposure
